channel.name: agent-deck
channel.subject: Possible complementary listing for agent-deck users: Ralph Workflow

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, the active lane is curator/comparison backlink outreach, GitHub PR execution is blocked in this runtime because gh auth is unavailable, and agent-deck was the highest-quality prepared target with a public maintainer email and a genuinely complementary audience.

runtime_constraint.evidence: gh auth status returned not logged in

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, mention, or link that sends relevant developers to the Codeberg primary repo
